tasks.title: Analyze Current Codebase Structure

tasks.details: Use Glob to explore project structure ('**/*.md', '**/*.py', '**/templates/**'), Grep to search for template references and patterns, Read key files (CLAUDE.md, CODEX.md, package.json). Document existing monolithic files (WORKFLOWS.md, PATTERNS.md), current template locations, reference patterns, and integration points. Create baseline inventory of all template-related files and their dependencies.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify inventory completeness by cross-referencing with git ls-files, ensure all template references are captured, validate file paths and accessibility

subtasks.title: Comprehensive Template Infrastructure Discovery
subtasks.description: Systematically discover all template-related files (.md, .py, YAML configs, and files under /templates/) in the Codex repository using optimized glob and ripgrep commands.
subtasks.details:
Run:

find /home/loucmane/codex -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.yml" -o -path "*/templates/*" \ ) > /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/template-file-list.txt

Use ripgrep for performance:
rg --files --type-add 'template:*.md' --type-add 'template:*.yml' --type-add 'template:*.py' --glob '**/templates/**' /home/loucmane/codex > /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/template-file-list-fast.txt

Expected output: List of all template-related files.

Test: pytest tests/test_analysis.py::test_file_inventory_completeness (should find 15+ template files)

Performance: Each directory scan <50ms, memory usage <500MB.

subtasks.title: Monolithic Files Inventory and Segmentation
subtasks.description: Identify and inventory all monolithic files (>100KB) such as WORKFLOWS.md and PATTERNS.md, and segment their contents for further analysis.
subtasks.details:
Run:

find /home/loucmane/codex -name "*.md" -size +100k > /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/monolithic-files-inventory.txt

Segment files:
python scripts/segment_monoliths.py --input /home/loucmane/codex/WORKFLOWS.md --output /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/WORKFLOWS_segments.json

Expected output: /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/monolithic-files-inventory.json

Test: pytest tests/test_analysis.py::test_monolithic_file_detection (should find 3+ files >100KB)

Validation: python scripts/validate_inventory.py --check-git-consistency

subtasks.title: Reference Pattern Mapping Across Codebase
subtasks.description: Map all template reference patterns ([[wiki-links]], {% includes %}, import statements) using grep and Python AST parsing.
subtasks.details:
Run:

grep -r '\[\[.*\]\]' --include='*.md' /home/loucmane/codex > /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/wiki-link-refs.txt
grep -r '{% *include' --include='*.md' /home/loucmane/codex > /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/include-refs.txt
python scripts/scan_imports.py --root /home/loucmane/codex --output /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/import-refs.json

Expected output: Mapped references in /home/loucmane/codex/docs/analysis/reference-patterns.json

Test: pytest tests/test_analysis.py::test_reference_pattern_mapping (should capture all reference types)

Performance: Use ripgrep for 10x faster search if available.

tasks.title: Setup Python Environment and Dependencies

tasks.title: Create Template Registry System
tasks.description: Build centralized registry for template discovery and management
tasks.details: Create TemplateRegistry class with in-memory index. Implement template discovery using glob patterns. Add caching layer with TTL for performance (<50ms target). Create fallback chain: modular → compatibility map → legacy → Serena → error. Implement template metadata parsing from frontmatter. Add search capabilities (by id, type, category, tags). Use functools.lru_cache for frequently accessed templates.
tasks.testStrategy: Benchmark discovery time (<50ms), test fallback chain order, verify cache invalidation, test search functionality, ensure thread-safety

subtasks.title: Design and Implement TemplateRegistry Class
subtasks.description: Create the main TemplateRegistry class in `src/codex/registry/template_registry.py` with methods for registration, lookup, and management of templates. Ensure thread-safety and extensibility for future features.
subtasks.details: Define the class architecture, including initialization, registration, retrieval, and update methods. Use appropriate locking mechanisms (e.g., threading.RLock) to ensure thread-safety. Document public APIs and internal methods.

subtasks.title: Implement Template Discovery Mechanism
subtasks.description: Develop a discovery scanner in `src/codex/registry/discovery.py` that uses glob patterns to scan multiple directories for template files, targeting <50ms scan time.
subtasks.details: Use Python's glob and os modules to recursively scan configured directories. Optimize for speed by minimizing disk I/O and using in-memory indexing. Support configuration via `config/registry.yaml`.

subtasks.title: Build Caching Layer with TTL Management
subtasks.description: Implement a caching strategy in `src/codex/registry/cache.py` using an in-memory LRU cache (functools.lru_cache) and optional Redis/memcached backend, with TTL management for cache invalidation.
subtasks.details: Design cache interfaces for template objects and metadata. Implement TTL logic to expire stale entries. Provide configuration for cache size and TTL in `config/registry.yaml`. Ensure cache operations are thread-safe.

subtasks.title: Develop Fallback Chain Logic
subtasks.description: Create fallback chain logic in `src/codex/registry/fallback.py` to resolve templates in the order: modular → compatibility map → legacy → Serena → error.
subtasks.details: Implement a priority-based resolver that attempts each source in order, short-circuiting on first success. Log resolution steps for debugging. Provide unit tests for all fallback scenarios.

subtasks.title: Implement Metadata Parsing from Frontmatter
subtasks.description: Build a metadata parser in `src/codex/registry/metadata.py` to extract and validate YAML/JSON frontmatter from template files.
subtasks.details: Support both YAML and JSON frontmatter formats. Validate required fields (id, type, category, tags). Raise descriptive errors for malformed metadata. Integrate parser with discovery and registry ingestion.

subtasks.title: Add Search Capabilities with Fuzzy Matching and Scoring
subtasks.description: Implement a search engine in `src/codex/registry/search.py` that supports searching templates by id, type, category, and tags, with fuzzy matching and relevance scoring.
subtasks.details: Use algorithms such as Levenshtein distance for fuzzy matching. Design a scoring formula that weights field matches and fuzziness. Support pagination and result ranking. Expose search API via TemplateRegistry.

subtasks.title: Integrate functools.lru_cache for Hot Path Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize frequently accessed template retrieval methods in `src/codex/registry/template_registry.py` using functools.lru_cache.
subtasks.details: Identify hot paths (e.g., get_template_by_id). Apply lru_cache with appropriate maxsize. Ensure cache coherence with external cache layer and TTL. Add tests for cache hit/miss behavior.

subtasks.title: Develop Performance Benchmarking Suite
subtasks.description: Create a benchmarking suite in `tests/benchmarks/registry_performance.py` to measure discovery, lookup, search, and fallback chain performance, ensuring <50ms latency.
subtasks.details: Write tests to benchmark end-to-end registry operations under various loads. Simulate concurrent access and cache churn. Report metrics for each operation and flag regressions. Integrate with CI pipeline.

tasks.title: Setup Git Hooks Infrastructure
tasks.description: Configure pre-commit hooks for automated validation
tasks.details: Install pre-commit framework: pip install pre-commit. Create .pre-commit-config.yaml with hooks for codex-guard, scanner incremental mode, secret scanning (detect-secrets), Python linting (ruff). Add custom hook scripts in .git/hooks/. Implement bypass mechanism with SKIP_HOOKS=1 environment variable. Configure hook output formatting for CI compatibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Test hooks trigger on commit, verify validation failures prevent commit, test bypass mechanism, ensure hooks run in CI environment

subtasks.title: Implement Template Validation Framework Core
subtasks.description: Develop the main validation framework at `src/codex/validation/framework.py` to orchestrate template validation, rule execution, and error aggregation.
subtasks.details: Design the framework to load templates, apply schema and custom validations, and collect results. Ensure modularity for easy integration of new validators and performance monitoring.

subtasks.title: Define and Maintain JSON Schema for Templates
subtasks.description: Create and manage comprehensive schema definitions for templates at `schemas/template_schema.json`.
subtasks.details: Include all required fields, types, and constraints. Support ajv-like features: type checks, required fields, pattern matching, enum validation, and custom error messages. Version and document the schema.

subtasks.title: Develop PyYAML-Based YAML Frontmatter Validator
subtasks.description: Implement strict YAML frontmatter validation at `src/codex/validation/yaml_validator.py` using PyYAML.
subtasks.details: Parse YAML frontmatter, enforce schema compliance, and reject non-conforming or ambiguous YAML. Add error codes for missing or malformed fields.

subtasks.title: Build Custom Rule Engine for Codex-Specific Validation
subtasks.description: Create a custom rule engine at `src/codex/validation/rules.py` to enforce codex-specific patterns and business logic.
subtasks.details: Implement rules for naming conventions, forbidden patterns, and required metadata. Allow easy addition of new rules. Assign unique error codes and document each rule.

subtasks.title: Optimize Validation Performance for Scale
subtasks.description: Ensure the framework validates at least 100 templates in under 1 second.
subtasks.details: Profile validation steps, parallelize where possible, and minimize I/O. Add benchmarks and automated performance tests to the test suite.

subtasks.title: Implement Detailed Error Reporting and Suggestions
subtasks.description: Develop error reporting at `src/codex/validation/errors.py` with detailed messages, error codes, and actionable fix suggestions.
subtasks.details: Format errors for both CLI and CI output. Include context, line numbers, and recommended fixes. Support output in JSON and human-readable formats.

subtasks.title: Add Auto-Fix Capabilities for Common Issues
subtasks.description: Implement auto-fix logic at `src/codex/validation/auto_fix.py` to automatically correct common validation errors.
subtasks.details: Support auto-fix for whitespace, field ordering, and simple pattern corrections. Provide a dry-run mode and detailed logs of changes.

subtasks.title: Integrate Validation Framework with Pre-Commit and CI/CD
subtasks.description: Configure `.pre-commit-config.yaml` to run the validation framework, and add tests at `tests/validation/test_framework.py` for CI compatibility.
subtasks.details: Add pre-commit hook entry, ensure SKIP_HOOKS=1 bypass works, and validate output formatting for CI. Test hook triggering, bypass, and CI integration.

tasks.title: Implement Reference Fix Scripts
tasks.description: Create automated scripts for fixing template references
tasks.details: Port apply_reference_fixes.py from FPL repo. Implement safe mode with backup creation. Add dry-run capability with detailed preview. Create apply_all_fixes.sh wrapper for batch operations. Implement rollback mechanism using git. Add progress tracking and logging. Handle special cases: symlinks, circular references, external references.
tasks.testStrategy: Test on sample files with known issues, verify dry-run doesn't modify files, test rollback restores original state, validate fix accuracy

subtasks.title: Design and Implement Backend API Endpoints
subtasks.description: Develop RESTful API endpoints using FastAPI in `src/codex/dashboard/api/` to serve migration progress, metrics, and user actions.
subtasks.details: Endpoints must include: `/progress` (GET, returns migration status and metrics), `/metrics` (GET, returns aggregated statistics), `/actions/rollback` (POST, triggers rollback), `/auth/login` (POST, JWT authentication). Ensure OpenAPI schema is generated.

subtasks.title: Create Database Models and Persistence Layer
subtasks.description: Define SQLAlchemy models in `src/codex/dashboard/models.py` for tracking migration jobs, progress events, user sessions, and rollback states. Integrate with PostgreSQL.
subtasks.details: Schema includes tables: `migrations` (id, status, started_at, completed_at), `progress_events` (id, migration_id, timestamp, message, percent_complete), `users` (id, username, password_hash), `rollbacks` (id, migration_id, triggered_by, timestamp). Implement migration scripts.

subtasks.title: Implement JWT Authentication System
subtasks.description: Develop authentication logic in `src/codex/dashboard/auth.py` to issue and validate JWT tokens for API and WebSocket access.
subtasks.details: Add `/auth/login` endpoint for credential verification and JWT issuance. Protect all API endpoints and WebSocket connections with JWT middleware. Store hashed passwords in the database.

subtasks.title: Develop WebSocket Server for Real-Time Updates
subtasks.description: Implement a WebSocket server in `src/codex/dashboard/websocket.py` to stream live migration progress and events to authenticated clients.
subtasks.details: WebSocket endpoint `/ws/progress` streams JSON updates on migration status and progress events. Integrate with backend event system and enforce JWT authentication on connection.

subtasks.title: Build React Frontend with Real-Time Dashboard
subtasks.description: Create a React app in `src/codex/dashboard/frontend/` with components for migration overview, progress bars, and event logs. Integrate with REST API and WebSocket.
subtasks.details: Component hierarchy: `DashboardApp` > `MigrationOverview`, `ProgressChart`, `EventLog`, `LoginForm`. Use WebSocket for live updates and REST API for initial data load. Implement JWT-based auth flow.

subtasks.title: Integrate Data Visualization Components
subtasks.description: Develop reusable chart components in `src/codex/dashboard/frontend/components/charts/` using Chart.js for metrics visualization.
subtasks.details: Charts include: migration completion timeline (line chart), per-job progress (progress bar), error rates (doughnut chart). All charts update in real-time via WebSocket events.

subtasks.title: Optimize Performance and Ensure Fast Load Times
subtasks.description: Profile and optimize backend and frontend to ensure dashboard loads in under 2 seconds under typical load.
subtasks.details: Implement API response caching, lazy-load heavy components, compress static assets, and use efficient SQL queries. Add automated performance tests to CI.

subtasks.title: Configure Docker and Deployment Scripts
subtasks.description: Create Dockerfiles in `docker/dashboard/` and deployment scripts in `deploy/dashboard/` for production deployment of the dashboard stack.
subtasks.details: Dockerize backend, frontend, and database. Compose with Docker Compose. Deployment scripts handle environment setup, database migrations, and service orchestration. Document deployment steps.

tasks.title: Create Migration Roadmap Generator
tasks.description: Build tool to generate prioritized migration plan from scanner outputs
tasks.details: Create RoadmapGenerator class reading scanner JSON outputs. Implement priority algorithm: critical (broken refs) → high (monolith refs) → medium (duplicates) → low (optimizations). Generate markdown report with task list, effort estimates, dependency graph. Add Gantt chart visualization using matplotlib. Export to Taskmaster-compatible format. Include risk assessment for each migration item.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify roadmap covers all scanner findings, test priority ordering logic, validate Taskmaster format compatibility, ensure estimates are reasonable

subtasks.title: Draft Main Migration Guide Structure
subtasks.description: Create the main migration guide at `docs/migration/guide.md` with a clear structure: Introduction, Migration Roadmap Overview, Priority Algorithm Explanation, Step-by-Step Migration Process, Risk Assessment, and Post-Migration Validation.
subtasks.details: Include navigation links to related sections (API, troubleshooting, examples). Ensure each section has a summary and actionable checklist.

subtasks.title: Develop API Reference Documentation
subtasks.description: Document the RoadmapGenerator API at `docs/api/reference.md` using OpenAPI/Swagger specs, covering all endpoints, input/output schemas, and error codes.
subtasks.details: Include code snippets for API usage, authentication details, and example requests/responses for each endpoint.

subtasks.title: Create Migration Code Example Library
subtasks.description: Populate `docs/examples/` with before/after migration code patterns, including handling of broken refs, monolith refs, duplicates, and optimizations.
subtasks.details: Each example should have a description, context, and annotated code blocks showing both legacy and migrated approaches.

subtasks.title: Design Visual Diagrams for Migration Process
subtasks.description: Add visual diagrams to `docs/diagrams/` using Mermaid.js or PlantUML, illustrating the migration workflow, dependency graph, and Gantt chart structure.
subtasks.details: Include diagrams for the priority algorithm, task dependencies, and risk assessment flows. Reference these diagrams in the main guide.

subtasks.title: Write Troubleshooting and FAQ Guide
subtasks.description: Develop `docs/migration/troubleshooting.md` with common migration issues, error messages, and step-by-step solutions.
subtasks.details: Include a FAQ section, diagnostic flowcharts, and escalation procedures for unresolved issues.

subtasks.title: Document Performance Benchmarks
subtasks.description: Create `docs/benchmarks/` with performance comparison tables showing pre- and post-migration metrics, including migration time, resource usage, and error rates.
subtasks.details: Include methodology, test scenarios, and interpretation of results. Reference benchmarks in the main guide and API docs.

subtasks.title: Configure Documentation Site and Interactive Examples
subtasks.description: Set up documentation site configuration in `mkdocs.yml` or `docusaurus.config.js`, enabling navigation, search, and interactive code examples.
subtasks.details: Integrate interactive migration scenarios using Docusaurus or MkDocs plugins. Ensure all documentation sections are linked and discoverable.

subtasks.title: Implement CI/CD Workflow for Documentation Publishing
subtasks.description: Create `.github/workflows/docs.yml` for automated building, testing, and publishing of the documentation site on every push to main.
subtasks.details: Include steps for linting Markdown, validating OpenAPI specs, building diagrams, and deploying to the chosen documentation hosting platform.

tasks.title: Setup Taskmaster Integration
tasks.description: Configure Taskmaster-AI for migration task management
tasks.details: Run 'taskmaster-ai init' in project root. Configure .taskmaster/config.json with API keys. Parse PRD using 'taskmaster-ai parse-prd .taskmaster/docs/prd.txt'. Set up MCP configuration in .mcp.json. Configure models with 'taskmaster-ai models --setup'. Create custom task templates for migration workflow. Set up task dependencies and milestones.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify Taskmaster initialization completes, test task creation from PRD, ensure API connectivity, validate task dependency graph

subtasks.title: Implement Dependency Analyzer Core
subtasks.description: Develop the core logic for parsing and analyzing task dependencies using NetworkX in Python.
subtasks.details: Create `src/codex/graph/dependency_analyzer.py` to parse `.taskmaster/tasks/tasks.json` and build a directed graph of tasks and their dependencies using NetworkX. Ensure support for large graphs (1000+ nodes).

subtasks.title: Build Graph Construction Module
subtasks.description: Develop a module to construct dependency graphs from parsed data.
subtasks.details: Implement `src/codex/graph/builder.py` to transform parsed task data into a NetworkX DiGraph, supporting attributes for status, priority, and milestones.

subtasks.title: Integrate Cycle Detection Algorithms
subtasks.description: Add cycle detection using Tarjan's SCC and Kosaraju's algorithms to identify circular dependencies.
subtasks.details: Create `src/codex/graph/cycle_detector.py` with implementations of Tarjan's and Kosaraju's algorithms. Highlight cycles and provide actionable feedback for resolution.

subtasks.title: Develop Graph Layout Engine
subtasks.description: Implement multiple graph layout algorithms for optimal visualization.
subtasks.details: Build `src/codex/graph/layout.py` supporting force-directed, hierarchical, and circular layouts. Optimize for clarity and scalability with large graphs.

subtasks.title: Create Visualization Frontend with Interactive Features
subtasks.description: Develop an interactive frontend using D3.js and Cytoscape.js for graph rendering and user interaction.
subtasks.details: Implement `src/codex/graph/frontend/` with D3.js/Cytoscape.js for rendering. Add zoom, pan, node details on click, and path highlighting. Integrate with WebGL renderer at `src/codex/graph/frontend/webgl_renderer.js` for performance.

subtasks.title: Optimize Rendering Performance
subtasks.description: Ensure the visualization engine can render 1000+ nodes in under 3 seconds.
subtasks.details: Profile and optimize frontend rendering, leveraging WebGL and efficient data structures. Test with synthetic large graphs to validate performance targets.

subtasks.title: Implement Export Capabilities
subtasks.description: Enable exporting of dependency graphs to SVG, PNG, GraphML, and DOT formats.
subtasks.details: Develop `src/codex/graph/export.py` to support exporting graphs in multiple formats. Integrate export options into the frontend UI.

subtasks.title: Integrate Graph Database Storage
subtasks.description: Persist dependency graphs and analysis results using a graph database module.
subtasks.details: Implement `src/codex/graph/storage.py` to store and retrieve graph structures, cycles, and layout metadata for fast reload and analysis.

tasks.title: Implement Compatibility Mapping Table
tasks.description: Create mapping system for backward compatibility during migration
tasks.details: Create CompatibilityMap class with bidirectional mapping. Store mappings in JSON format: {monolith_anchor: modular_path}. Implement lookup methods with O(1) performance. Add version tracking for mapping changes. Create update mechanism for incremental migrations. Implement conflict resolution for duplicate mappings. Add validation to ensure all mappings resolve.
tasks.testStrategy: Test bidirectional lookups, verify performance with large datasets, test version migration, validate conflict resolution logic

subtasks.title: Set Up Unit Test Suite for CompatibilityMap
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for the CompatibilityMap class covering bidirectional lookups, JSON serialization/deserialization, version tracking, conflict resolution, and validation logic.
subtasks.details: File path: tests/unit/test_compatibility_map.py. Include test scenarios for O(1) lookups, mapping updates, duplicate handling, and validation failures. Ensure minimum 80% code coverage for all public methods.

subtasks.title: Design and Implement Test Fixtures
subtasks.description: Develop reusable pytest fixtures for test data, mock mappings, and versioned mapping states to support unit and integration tests.
subtasks.details: File path: tests/fixtures/conftest.py. Fixtures should provide sample mapping JSONs, mock version histories, and conflict scenarios. Use pytest's fixture scope and autouse features for efficient setup/teardown.

subtasks.title: Configure Pytest with Plugins and Markers
subtasks.description: Set up pytest configuration for the project, enabling plugins (pytest-cov, pytest-benchmark), custom markers for slow/integration/performance tests, and global options.
subtasks.details: File paths: pytest.ini, .coveragerc. Define markers: 'integration', 'performance', 'mutation'. Configure minimum 80% coverage threshold and fail on missing coverage. Enable pytest-xdist for parallel execution.

subtasks.title: Develop Integration Test Suite with Dockerized Environment
subtasks.description: Implement integration tests to validate CompatibilityMap behavior in a simulated migration pipeline using Docker containers for isolated environments.
subtasks.details: File path: tests/integration/test_migration_pipeline.py. Use docker-compose to spin up test containers. Test end-to-end mapping, version migration, and conflict resolution across service boundaries.

subtasks.title: Implement Performance Test Harness
subtasks.description: Create performance benchmarks for CompatibilityMap using pytest-benchmark to ensure O(1) lookup and update operations under large datasets.
subtasks.details: File path: tests/performance/test_compatibility_map_perf.py. Benchmark lookups, updates, and conflict resolution with datasets of 10^4 to 10^6 mappings. Set performance thresholds and regression alerts.

subtasks.title: Set Up Mutation Testing for Test Effectiveness
subtasks.description: Integrate mutmut for mutation testing to assess the effectiveness of the test suite and identify untested code paths.
subtasks.details: File path: tests/unit/test_compatibility_map.py. Configure mutmut to run against the CompatibilityMap module. Document surviving mutations and add tests to eliminate them.

subtasks.title: Develop Mock Factories for Mapping Objects
subtasks.description: Create mock factories using factory_boy or pytest-factoryboy to generate mapping objects, versioned states, and conflict scenarios for tests.
subtasks.details: File path: tests/factories/mapping_factory.py. Factories should support parameterized creation of valid, invalid, and edge-case mappings for robust test coverage.

subtasks.title: Integrate Test Suite with CI/CD Pipeline
subtasks.description: Configure CI/CD workflow to run all tests in parallel, enforce coverage and mutation thresholds, and report results for every commit.
subtasks.details: File path: .github/workflows/tests.yml. Use matrix strategy for Python versions. Steps: install dependencies, run unit/integration/performance/mutation tests, enforce 80%+ coverage, fail on mutation survivors, and upload artifacts.

tasks.title: Create Work-Tracking Template Structure
tasks.description: Establish standardized work-tracking directory and file structure
tasks.details: Create docs/ai/work-tracking/active/ directory structure. Set up 7 canonical files: TRACKER.md, HANDOFF.md, FINDINGS.md, IMPLEMENTATION.md, MEMORY-REFS.md, CHANGELOG.md, plans/. Create templates for each file type with S:W:H:E format. Implement auto-generation script for new work items. Add validation for required sections. Create archival process for completed work.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify directory structure creation, test file template generation, validate S:W:H:E format compliance, test archival process

subtasks.title: Implement Error Handler Module
subtasks.description: Create the main error handler at `src/codex/recovery/handler.py` to coordinate error recovery mechanisms and route errors to appropriate strategies.
subtasks.details: Define a central handler class that receives error events, logs context, and invokes retry, rollback, or circuit breaker modules as needed. Ensure extensibility for future recovery strategies.

subtasks.title: Develop Retry Logic with Exponential Backoff and Jitter
subtasks.description: Implement robust retry logic in `src/codex/recovery/retry.py` using exponential backoff and random jitter to mitigate thundering herd problems.
subtasks.details: Support configurable max attempts, initial delay, multiplier, and jitter. Integrate with handler to automatically retry transient errors. Document retry algorithm and edge cases.

subtasks.title: Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern
subtasks.description: Create a circuit breaker at `src/codex/recovery/circuit_breaker.py` with state transitions (Closed, Open, Half-Open) to prevent repeated failures.
subtasks.details: Track error rates and thresholds. Transition between states based on failure/success metrics. Expose hooks for handler to check breaker state before processing requests.

subtasks.title: Design Rollback Mechanisms
subtasks.description: Build rollback manager at `src/codex/recovery/rollback.py` to revert operations using database transactions and git checkpoints.
subtasks.details: Support atomic rollback for database changes and git-based file restores. Define rollback checkpoints and ensure consistency across distributed operations.

subtasks.title: Create Dead Letter Queue for Failed Operations
subtasks.description: Implement a dead letter queue at `src/codex/recovery/dlq.py` to capture and persistently store unrecoverable errors for manual review.
subtasks.details: Design queue structure, serialization format, and retention policy. Integrate with handler to route failed operations after max retries or circuit breaker open.

subtasks.title: Integrate Monitoring and Alerting
subtasks.description: Add monitoring and alerting in `src/codex/recovery/monitoring.py` using structured logging and metrics for error recovery events.
subtasks.details: Log recovery attempts, circuit breaker transitions, rollback actions, and DLQ entries. Emit metrics for error rates, recovery latency, and alert on threshold breaches.

subtasks.title: Implement Recovery Strategies
subtasks.description: Develop modular recovery strategies in `src/codex/recovery/strategies/` for compensate, retry, skip, and manual intervention.
subtasks.details: Define strategy interfaces and implement logic for each type. Allow handler to select appropriate strategy based on error type and context.

subtasks.title: Enforce Performance Requirements
subtasks.description: Ensure all recovery decisions are made within <100ms and configure thresholds in `config/recovery.yaml`.
subtasks.details: Benchmark recovery modules, optimize code paths, and set configuration parameters for latency targets. Add automated tests to validate performance under load.

tasks.title: Enforce Serena Integration for Template System
tasks.description: Guarantee that template discovery, analysis, and evidence gathering are always routed through Serena MCP, with enforcement across docs, guard, and workflows.
tasks.details: Update documentation, guard rules, and work-tracking flows so Serena is the mandatory entry point for template discovery and evidence gathering. Provide reference queries, ensure memories (scanner baselines, compaction checkpoints) are maintained, and remove manual workarounds.
tasks.testStrategy: Run an end-to-end template change using Serena queries, guard validation, and recorded evidence across sessions/work-tracking.

subtasks.title: Update Template System Documentation for Serena Routing
subtasks.description: Document mandatory Serena usage across CODEX.md, CLAUDE.md, templates/TOOLS.md, and work-tracking guidance.
subtasks.details: Update references so developers must use Serena for registry-first discovery and evidence collection, citing command examples and logging requirements.

subtasks.title: Configure Serena Activation in MCP and Session Workflows
subtasks.description: Ensure Serena project activation is automatic in .mcp.json, session templates, and handoff docs.
subtasks.details: Document activation via `serena activate_project codex` and add checkpoints to session/handoff templates so activation is never skipped.

subtasks.title: Create Serena Query Reference
subtasks.description: Provide quick-reference scripts for Serena commands (find_symbol, search_for_pattern, memories).
subtasks.details: Write docs/reference/serena_queries.md showing command usage, output expectations, and evidence logging patterns.

subtasks.title: Seed and Maintain Serena Memories
subtasks.description: Ensure baseline scanner outputs and compaction checkpoints are stored as Serena memories with retention policies.
subtasks.details: Create/maintain memories (compaction, enforcement, template baselines) and document naming/retention (180 days active).

subtasks.title: Update codex-guard to Require Serena Evidence
subtasks.description: Modify guard validation to fail template edits lacking Serena-backed evidence.
subtasks.details: Add checks ensuring changed templates include Serena evidence references; include clear diagnostics and allowlist rules.

subtasks.title: Embed Serena Usage in Work-Tracking Templates
subtasks.description: Add Serena checkpoints to TRACKER, HANDOFF, and session templates.
subtasks.details: Update work-tracking files so every template change checklist includes Serena search/memory logging steps.

subtasks.title: Provide Serena-Driven S:W:H:E Examples
subtasks.description: Create sample S:W:H:E entries demonstrating Serena query snippets and evidence logs.
subtasks.details: Document examples in docs/examples/serena_evidence.md showing how to cite Serena output in sessions/work-tracking logs.

subtasks.title: Execute End-to-End Serena Validation
subtasks.description: Perform a dry run applying a template edit using Serena queries, guard validation, and work-tracking logging.
subtasks.details: Run a sample template modification, document Serena searches/memories, capture guard output, and update session/work-tracking evidence.

tasks.title: Create Performance Testing Harness
tasks.description: Build comprehensive performance testing suite for migration validation
tasks.details: Create performance_tests.py with pytest-benchmark. Implement tests: test_template_discovery_time (<50ms target), test_context_token_usage (30% reduction target), test_scanner_incremental (<10s), test_guard_validation (<5s). Add profiling for top 20 templates. Create baseline capture mechanism. Implement regression detection (warning +20%, critical +50%). Add CI integration with performance gates.
tasks.testStrategy: Run benchmarks against current baseline, verify metrics collection accuracy, test regression detection thresholds, ensure CI integration works

subtasks.title: Implement Checklist Manager Core
subtasks.description: Develop the core checklist manager at `src/codex/checklist/manager.py` to handle checklist creation, retrieval, and updates.
subtasks.details: Design a class-based engine to manage checklists, supporting CRUD operations and interfacing with state persistence and dependency modules. Ensure extensibility for future checklist types.

subtasks.title: Implement State Persistence Layer
subtasks.description: Create state management and persistence at `src/codex/checklist/storage.py` to store checklist progress and state.
subtasks.details: Use a file-based (e.g., JSON or SQLite) or pluggable backend to persist checklist state. Implement atomic save/load operations and support for resuming interrupted sessions.

subtasks.title: Develop Dependency Resolver with Topological Sorting
subtasks.description: Build a dependency resolver at `src/codex/checklist/dependencies.py` that supports task dependencies and topological sorting.
subtasks.details: Implement a directed acyclic graph (DAG) model for checklist items. Use Kahn's algorithm or depth-first search for topological sorting to resolve execution order and detect cycles.

subtasks.title: Implement Progress Tracking Engine
subtasks.description: Create a progress calculator at `src/codex/checklist/progress.py` to compute completion percentages.
subtasks.details: Design a formula: progress = (completed_items / total_items) * 100. Support weighted items and dependency-aware progress calculation. Expose API for real-time progress updates.

subtasks.title: Develop Validation Engine for Checklist Items
subtasks.description: Implement validation rules at `src/codex/checklist/validator.py` for checklist item correctness and completeness.
subtasks.details: Support rule-based and custom Python validation functions. Validate required fields, dependency satisfaction, and custom constraints. Integrate with manager for real-time feedback.

subtasks.title: Build Interactive CLI with Rich
subtasks.description: Create an interactive CLI at `src/codex/checklist/cli.py` using Rich for terminal UI.
subtasks.details: Implement commands for checklist navigation, item completion, progress display, and validation feedback. Use Rich for tables, progress bars, and colored output.

subtasks.title: Implement Report Generator for Multiple Formats
subtasks.description: Develop a report generator at `src/codex/checklist/reports.py` to export checklists in Markdown, JSON, and HTML.
subtasks.details: Support export of checklist state, progress, and validation results. Use Jinja2 templates for HTML/Markdown and standard library for JSON. Place templates in `templates/checklists/`.

subtasks.title: Integrate Checklist System with CI/CD
subtasks.description: Add CI/CD integration for automated checklist verification.
subtasks.details: Provide CLI and API hooks for CI pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions, GitLab CI). Fail builds on incomplete or invalid checklists. Output machine-readable status for pipeline consumption.

tasks.title: Setup Monitoring Infrastructure
tasks.description: Establish metrics collection and monitoring dashboards
tasks.details: Set up Prometheus exporters for metrics. Create Grafana dashboards for migration health, template usage, performance metrics. Implement StatsD client for application metrics. Add log aggregation with Elasticsearch. Configure alerts: discovery >100ms, guard failures >5/hr, cost >80% budget. Create migration progress tracker. Add telemetry decorators for template loads.

tasks.title: Create Template Testing Framework

subtasks.title: Design TemplateTestCase Base Class

subtasks.details: Define core test lifecycle methods (setup, teardown, class-level fixtures). Integrate with chosen test runner. Ensure extensibility for future test types. Include comprehensive unit tests, simulate test failures, validate recovery from test errors, and assess performance overhead.

subtasks.title: Implement Template Execution Mocking
subtasks.description: Create a robust mocking system to simulate template execution environments and isolate template logic from external dependencies.
subtasks.details: Develop mock objects for template inputs, outputs, and external services. Support configurable mock behaviors for edge cases and failures. Test with various template scenarios, simulate execution errors, validate fallback mechanisms, and measure mocking overhead.

subtasks.title: Add Assertion Methods for Template Behavior
subtasks.description: Develop a comprehensive set of assertion methods tailored for template output, side effects, and error handling.
subtasks.details: Implement assertions for output equality, structure, and error conditions. Support custom assertion extensions. Test assertion accuracy, simulate assertion failures, validate error reporting, and benchmark assertion performance.

subtasks.title: Create Fixture System for Template Test Data
subtasks.description: Build a fixture management system to provide reusable, isolated test data for template tests.
subtasks.details: Support static and dynamic fixtures, parameterized data, and cleanup hooks. Integrate with test runner for automatic fixture injection. Test fixture isolation, simulate data corruption, validate fixture recovery, and assess fixture loading speed.

subtasks.title: Implement Template Coverage Tracking
subtasks.description: Develop a coverage tracking module to measure which template logic paths are exercised during tests.
subtasks.details: Instrument template execution for line, branch, and condition coverage. Generate detailed coverage reports. Test with partial and full coverage scenarios, simulate missed paths, validate report accuracy, and measure tracking overhead.

subtasks.title: Add Mutation Testing for Template Logic
subtasks.description: Integrate mutation testing to assess the effectiveness of template tests by introducing controlled changes and verifying test failure.
subtasks.details: Automate mutation generation for template logic. Track mutation detection rates. Test with various mutation types, simulate undetected mutations, validate mutation rollback, and benchmark mutation test execution time.

subtasks.title: Create Template Benchmark Suite
subtasks.description: Develop a benchmarking suite to measure template execution performance under different scenarios.
subtasks.details: Implement performance metrics collection (latency, throughput, resource usage). Support configurable benchmark scenarios. Test with large-scale templates, simulate performance regressions, validate benchmark accuracy, and assess benchmarking overhead.

subtasks.title: Implement Visual Regression Testing for UI Templates
subtasks.description: Build a visual regression testing system to detect unintended UI changes in template rendering.
subtasks.details: Capture and compare template render outputs using image diffing. Support baseline management and threshold configuration. Test with intentional and accidental UI changes, simulate rendering failures, validate diff accuracy, and measure visual test execution time.

tasks.title: Setup Change Advisory Board Process

tasks.details: Create CAB meeting structure and cadence. Define change request template. Implement change tracking system. Create risk assessment framework. Add stakeholder approval workflow. Implement change communication plan. Create change metrics tracking. Add post-implementation reviews.

subtasks.title: Implement Change Tracking System

subtasks.title: Establish CAB Meeting Cadence and Agenda

subtasks.title: Create Risk Assessment and Approval Workflow

subtasks.title: Implement Change Communication Plan
subtasks.description: Design and execute a communication plan to inform stakeholders of upcoming changes, decisions, and outcomes, ensuring transparency and readiness.
subtasks.details: Specify notification channels, timing, and message templates for different change types. Include feedback mechanisms and escalation contacts. Test delivery and comprehension with sample communications.

subtasks.title: Establish Change Metrics and Reporting
subtasks.description: Define, collect, and report on key change management metrics such as approval times, change success rates, and incident correlation.
subtasks.details: Implement automated metric collection in the tracking system. Create dashboards and regular reports for CAB and stakeholders. Validate metric accuracy and usefulness.

subtasks.title: Implement Post-Implementation Review Process
subtasks.description: Create a structured process for post-implementation reviews to assess change outcomes, capture lessons learned, and drive continuous improvement.
subtasks.details: Define review criteria, schedule, and documentation requirements. Integrate review findings into CAB meetings and change process updates. Ensure follow-up actions are tracked and completed.

tasks.title: Implement Scanner Optimization

tasks.title: Implement CI/CD Gates
tasks.description: Phase 3 - Create automated quality gates for CI/CD
tasks.details: Add scanner gate with zero tolerance for errors. Implement guard gate with auto-fix. Add performance gate with regression detection. Create security gate with vulnerability scanning. Implement cost gate with budget checks. Add approval gate for production. Create gate override mechanism. Implement gate metrics collection.
tasks.testStrategy: Test each gate triggers correctly, verify override mechanism, test gate metrics, validate production safety

subtasks.title: Implement Scanner Gate with Zero Tolerance for Errors
subtasks.description: Develop and integrate a scanner gate that automatically blocks pipeline progression if any code quality or static analysis errors are detected. Ensure integration with code scanning tools and enforce zero error policy.
subtasks.details: Integrate static code analysis tools (e.g., SonarQube, ESLint) into the CI/CD pipeline. Configure the gate to fail the build on any detected error. Implement comprehensive testing to verify event ordering, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for scanner events.

subtasks.title: Implement Guard Gate with Auto-Fix Capabilities
subtasks.description: Create a guard gate that detects common issues (e.g., formatting, linting) and applies automated fixes before allowing pipeline progression. Ensure auto-fix actions are logged and validated.
subtasks.details: Integrate tools for auto-fixing code issues (e.g., Prettier, autopep8). Ensure the gate applies fixes, re-runs checks, and only passes if all issues are resolved. Include event-driven triggers, ordering guarantees, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for guard events.

subtasks.title: Add Performance Gate with Regression Detection
subtasks.description: Develop a performance gate that benchmarks application performance and blocks deployments if regressions are detected compared to baseline metrics.
subtasks.details: Integrate performance testing tools (e.g., JMeter, k6) into the pipeline. Configure regression thresholds and baseline comparisons. Ensure event-driven reporting, ordering guarantees, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for performance events.

subtasks.title: Create Security Gate with Vulnerability Scanning
subtasks.description: Implement a security gate that performs automated vulnerability scans on code and dependencies, blocking pipeline progression if vulnerabilities are found.
subtasks.details: Integrate security scanning tools (e.g., Snyk, Trivy, OWASP ZAP). Configure the gate to enforce policy thresholds for vulnerabilities. Ensure event-driven notifications, ordering guarantees, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for security events.

subtasks.title: Implement Cost Gate with Budget Checks
subtasks.description: Develop a cost gate that checks projected deployment costs against predefined budgets and blocks deployments exceeding budget limits.
subtasks.details: Integrate cloud cost estimation tools (e.g., Infracost). Configure budget thresholds and enforce blocking on overages. Ensure event-driven cost reporting, ordering guarantees, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for cost events.

subtasks.title: Add Approval Gate for Production Deployments
subtasks.description: Create an approval gate that requires explicit human or automated approval before allowing production deployments to proceed.
subtasks.details: Implement approval workflows (e.g., via GitHub Actions, GitLab, or custom UI). Enforce multi-level or role-based approvals as needed. Ensure event-driven approval tracking, ordering guarantees, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for approval events.

subtasks.title: Create Gate Override Mechanism
subtasks.description: Develop a secure override mechanism that allows authorized personnel to bypass specific gates under controlled circumstances, with full audit logging.
subtasks.details: Implement override workflows with strict access controls and audit trails. Ensure all override events are event-driven, ordered, exactly-once, and recoverable in disaster scenarios.

subtasks.title: Implement Gate Metrics Collection and Monitoring
subtasks.description: Build a metrics collection system to monitor gate performance, failures, overrides, and overall pipeline health in real-time.
subtasks.details: Integrate metrics collection (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana) for all gates. Track pass/fail rates, override frequency, and latency. Ensure event-driven metrics, ordering guarantees, exactly-once delivery, and disaster recovery for metrics events.

tasks.title: Create Template Caching Layer
tasks.description: Implement high-performance caching for template access
tasks.details: Implement Redis cache for template storage. Add in-memory LRU cache as L1. Create cache warming on startup. Implement cache invalidation on changes. Add cache hit/miss metrics. Create distributed cache for multi-instance. Implement cache persistence. Add cache debugging tools.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cache hit rates, verify invalidation, test distributed cache sync, measure performance improvement

subtasks.title: Design and Implement Cloud Abstraction Layer
subtasks.description: Develop provider-agnostic APIs for caching, resource normalization, service mapping, and credential management to enable seamless multi-cloud integration with <100ms API overhead.
subtasks.details: Implement in `src/codex/multicloud/abstraction/provider.py` and `src/codex/multicloud/abstraction/resources.py`. Ensure abstraction supports Redis, in-memory LRU, and distributed cache operations across multiple cloud providers. Include comprehensive testing, vendor lock-in avoidance, cost optimization, and compliance validation.

subtasks.title: Establish Multi-Cloud Networking Mesh
subtasks.description: Set up cross-cloud VPNs, network peering, global load balancing, and traffic optimization to ensure cache nodes communicate with <50ms latency between clouds.
subtasks.details: Implement in `src/codex/multicloud/network/mesh.py` and `src/codex/multicloud/network/vpn.py`. Validate secure, low-latency connectivity for distributed cache synchronization. Include comprehensive testing, vendor lock-in avoidance, cost optimization, and compliance validation.

subtasks.details: Implement in `src/codex/multicloud/data/replicator.py` and `src/codex/multicloud/data/sync.py`. Ensure cache data is consistent and available across all cloud regions. Include comprehensive testing, vendor lock-in avoidance, cost optimization, and compliance validation.
